entry.title: 看世界20210127
entry.content:
It’s been one year since a helicopter crash claimed Bryant, his daughter Gianna and seven others, sending shock and sorrow through the basketball world. To NBA veterans, Bryant was an admired, respected and feared rival. To younger players, he was an icon, a role model and, to many, a valued mentor.

  • a helicopter crash 直升机坠毁
  • helicopter n. 直升机
  • crash n. 碰撞；崩溃；坠落 vt. 破碎；撞碎；坠落 vi. 碰撞；坠毁；闯；突然倒台 adj. 速成的
  • claim vt. 声称, 断言；(灾难等)使失踪或死亡；需要, 值得 vt. & vi. 对…提出要求, 索取 n. 主张, 断言；要求
  • claim the lives of 夺走...的生命
  • veteran n. 经验丰富的人; 老兵；退伍军人
  • icon n. 图标；肖像，画像；圣像；偶像
  • mentor n. (无经验之人的)有经验可信赖的顾问
  • Examples:
    • An array of reports on the murder case have triggered multiple copycat crimes in Calidornia , sending shock waves through the Golden State.
      • an array of = an avalanche of 大量
      • avalanche n. 雪崩 vi. 雪崩;雪崩般塌落 vt. (因大量涌至而)把...淹没,使无法应
      • trigger vt. 触发；引发，引起 vi. 松开扳柄 n. 触发器；扳机；制滑机
      • copycat n. 盲目模仿者
      • send shock waves through 使...受到冲击
    • His Mamba Mentality will live on forever in many of us.
    • 我们分手已经一年了。
    • It's been a year since we broke up.
      • It's been a year since Kobe Bryant departed his life.

entry.title: 看世界20210126
entry.content:
China Overtakes U.S. as World’s Leading Destination for Foreign Direct Investment

  • overtake ... as 超过...成为

  • Foreign Direct Investment (FDI)

  • destination n. 目的地, 终点 > China overtook the U.S. as the world’s top destination for new foreign direct investment last year, as the Covid-19 pandemic amplifies an eastward shift in the center of gravity of the global economy.

  • top = leading

  • amplify vt. 放大, 扩大；增强 vt. & vi. 详述

  • the center of gravity of the global economy

New investments by overseas businesses into the U.S., which for decades held the No. 1 spot, fell 49% in 2020, according to U.N. figures released Sunday, as the country struggled to curb the spread of the new coronavirus and economc output slumped.

  • hold the No.1 spot 排名第一
  • claim/capture the top spot 夺冠
  • recapture the Blue House 重新夺回青瓦台
  • curb = contain
  • slump vi. 大幅度下降, 暴跌；沉重或突然地落下[倒下] n. 萧条期；〈美〉(个人、球队等的)低潮状态

China, long ranked No. 2, saw direct investments by foreign companies climb 4%, the United Nations Conference on Trade and Development said. Beijing used strict lockdowns to largely contain Covid-19, and China’s gross domestic product grew even as most other major economies contracted last year.

  • foreign companies = overseas businesses
  • largely 很大程度上
  • gross domestic product (GDP)
  • contract vi. 感染 = pick up ；订约；收缩 = shrink vt. 感染；订约；使缩短 n. 合同；婚约
  • He is on a temporary contract.

The 2020 investment numbers underline China’s move toward the center of a global economy long dominated by the U.S.—a shift that accelerated during the pandemic as China has cemented its position as the world’s factory floor and expanded its share of global trade.

  • underline = highlight = underscore 强调
  • a shift that/which accelerated =a shift accelerating
  • a shift accelerated by ...
  • cement n. 水泥；接合剂, 黏合物 vt. 在…上抹水泥；粘牢；巩固, 加强 = consolidate
  • factory floor 世界工厂
  • the lion's share 最大的份额
  • Examples :
    • Beijing is adopting / considering / weighing measures to scale back its investment in the US , a shift accelerated by a wideing rift / division / split with Washington since Trump came into office / power.
      • scale back 缩减
      • since Trump came into office / power = since Trump took office = since Trump assumed office = since Trump was in office = since Trump took his presidency

entry.title: 看世界20210125
entry.content:
Amazon is seeking to postpone a unionization vote at a warehouse in Alabama and is asking federal labor authorities to reconsider a decision to allow mail-in voting due to the pandemic.

  • postpone vt. 使…延期；把…放在次要地位；把…放在后面 vi. 延缓，延迟；延缓发作

  • unionization n. 联合,结合

  • a unionization vote 工会投票

  • mail-in voting 邮寄投票 > Amazon and Jeff Bezos do not want their workers voting by mail-in-ballots on unionization. An Amazon spokesperson tells CNN the company is seeking a "valid, fair and successful election" and in-person would ensure that.

  • mail-in-ballots 邮寄选票

  • ballot n. 投票表决, 选举；选票 vt. & vi. (使)投票表决

entry.title: 看世界20210124 - PART II
entry.content:
Sad day for women’s sports. Women must compete against biological males at the risk of injury and loss of title, thanks to a new Biden executive order. Don’t ever tell me this is “pro-woman.” It’s not. It’s destructive and malicious.

  • at the risk of 冒着...风险
  • title n. 题目, 标题；称号, 头衔；权益, 权利；冠军
  • thanks to 因为
  • a executive order 行政命令
  • issue a executive order 发布行政命令
  • destructive adj. 破坏性的, 毁灭性的
  • malicious adj. 恶意的, 恶毒的 > Don’t tell me Joe Biden or Kamala Harris care about women when Biden forces public schools to allow biological males on women’s sports teams on his first day in office.

“The fastest female sprinter in the world is American runner Allyson Felix, a woman with more gold medals than Usain Bolt. Her lifetime best for the 400-meter run is 49.26 seconds. Based on 2018 data, nearly 300 high-school boys in the U.S. alone could beat it.”

  • sprinter n. 短距离全速奔跑者, 短跑运动员

In less than 72 hours, Joe Biden:

—Killed 70,000+ jobs

—Eliminated women's sports

—Invaded Syria

—Left the National Guard to freeze in a garage

—Admitted he doesn't have a plan to fight COVID

—Broke his own mask mandate EO

—Ended US energy independence

Do you miss Trump yet?

  • eliminate vt. 消除, 排除；忽略；淘汰；〈口〉干掉
  • invade vt. 侵略；侵袭；侵扰；涌入 vi. 侵略；侵袭；侵犯；侵入
  • home invader / intruder 侵略者
  • mandate n. (选民对选出的代表、议会等的)授权；(上级官员对下级官员下达的)正式命令 vt. 将(某地)委托某国管理；授权(某人)根据委托统治权(做某事)

entry.title: 看世界20210124
entry.content:
Manchester City produced a ruthless attacking display to cruise past Chelsea at Stamford Bridge and increase the pressure on manager Frank Lampard.

  • Manchester City 曼城

  • Manchester United 曼联

  • Chelsea 切尔西

  • Stamford Bridge 斯坦福桥（切尔西主场）

  • ruthless adj.无情的，冷酷的; 残忍的; 狠; 辣

  • cruise n.乘船游览; 航游 v.乘船游览; 缓慢行进; 轻取

  • cruise past 轻松胜过

  • increase = heap = pile the pressure on

  • English Premier League 英超 > The visitors, who were without a number of first-team players following an outbreak of coronavirus at the club, stunned Chelsea with three goals in 16 first-half minutes.

  • first-team players 首发球员

  • first-half 上半场

  • stun vt. 使震惊；打昏；给以深刻的印象 n. 昏迷；打昏；惊倒；令人惊叹的事物

On 23 April, Chelsea played away at Bournemouth. The game remained goalless until the 66th minute with Cesc Fàbregas scoring a penalty.

  • play away 输掉（金钱）；在外比赛；浪费（时间）
  • play away with / against
  • Bournemouth n. 伯恩茅斯
  • penalty n. 罚款，罚金；处罚
  • penalty kick 罚点球，罚球
  • score a penalty 点球得分
  • odds 赔率

entry.title: 看世界20210123
entry.content:
NEVER GONNA GIVE YOU PUP: This devoted dog spent days waiting outside a hospital where her sick owner was receiving treatment.

  • pup n.幼小动物

  • puppy n.小狗；幼犬；傲慢小子；自负无礼的青年

  • devoted adj.挚爱的；忠诚的 = loyal ；全心全意的 > Toddler Keeps Mum And Dad Awake

  • toddler n.学步的幼儿；刚学会走路的孩子

The mother of a toddler had her hands full during bedtime, her son opting to climb all over her instead of settling down to sleep.

  • has one's hands full 忙得不可开交
  • set down rules/laws 制定规则/法律
  • settle down （使某人）安静下来，平静下来；（在某地）定居下来，过安定的生活；舒适地坐下（或躺下）

entry.title: 看世界20210122
entry.content:
Check Out US President’s Rarely Seen Official State Car, Bulletproof Chevrolet Suburban SUV

  • Chevrolet 雪佛兰 Cruz 克鲁兹

  • General Motors

  • General Electric

  • bulletproof adj. 防弹的

  • suburban adj. 土气的；郊区的，城郊的；见闻不广的 n. 郊区居民

  • Sport Utility Vehicle (SUV) 越野车

  • pickup truck 皮卡 > It’s no news that the US presidential limousine, popularly known as “the Beast” and “Cadillac One”, is the official state car of the president of the United States.

  • It’s no news that ... = ...已经不是新闻

  • limousine n. 豪华轿车

  • popularly known as 俗称

The heavily armoured Cadillac-branded vehicle is one of the safest presidential car on the planet.

  • armoured adj. 装甲的； 配备有装甲车辆的
  • heavily armoured 重装甲的
  • heavily armed 全副武装的

The current model, which debuted on September 24, 2018, has been spotted in the midst of presidential motorcades that range between 24–45 vehicles.

  • debute n. 〈法〉演员首次演出
  • in the midst of 在...之中
  • motorcade n. 一长列汽车,(汽)车队
  • range between 介于

But there is another rarely seen US President’s official state car : a bulletproof Chevrolet Suburban SUV, which the President normally use when his trip within or outside the country requires going off-road.

  • go off-road 越野

The SUV was used to ferry Donald Trump during the president’s surprise trip to Afghanistan to visit U.S. troops in 2019.

  • ferry n. 渡口；渡船；摆渡 vt. （乘渡船）渡过；用渡船运送；空运 vi. 摆渡；来往行驶
  • surprise trip 突访
  • Afghanistan n. 阿富汗
  • troop n. 军队, 部队；一群, 一队 vi. 成群结队地走
  • vet vt. 诊疗；审查 =visit vi. 作兽医；诊疗 n. 兽医
  • the Patriot Party 爱国者党

entry.title: 看世界20210121
entry.content:
Meet Kyuta: the 10-year-old, 85-kilo sumo in training

  • sumo 相扑

  • sumo wrestling 相扑

  • sumo wrestler n. 相朴运动员 > TOKYO, Jan 19 (Reuters) - Among the young sumo wrestlers lifting weights in the ring, 10-year-old Kyuta Kumagai stands out.

  • wrestler n. 摔跤选手，搏斗者

  • wrestle n. 摔跤；斗争；搏斗 v. 斗争；摔跤；斟酌

At 85 kilograms (187 lb), Kyuta is twice the size of the other children his age and is so dominant that he wrestles, and beats, boys five or six years older.

Last year, he was crowned the under-10 world champion, beating out competition from as far afield as the United Kingdom and Ukraine.

  • crown n. 王冠；王权；花冠；顶点 vt. 加冕；居…之顶；表彰；使圆满完成
  • champion n. 冠军；捍卫者, 拥护者
  • defending champion 卫冕冠军
  • world championship 世界竞标赛
  • beat out 击败
  • competition n. 比赛；竞争；竞争对手=competitor = rival
  • afield adv. 在战场上；去野外；在远处；远离著
  • as far afield as 远至
  • Ukraine 乌克兰

His training regime, devised by his father Taisuke, is relentless.

  • regime n. 政权，政体；社会制度；管理体制
  • devise vt. 想出; 计划; 设计; 发明
  • relentless adj. 残酷的, 不留情的, 无怜悯心的

He trains six days a week, either at his local sumo club or lifting weights. He also swims and practices track and field to build up the flexibility and explosive quickness needed for sumo wrestling.

  • track and field 田径

  • build up 增强

  • flexibility n. 柔韧性；机动性，灵活性

  • inflexibility n. 不屈性,顽固,不变性

  • explosive adj. 爆炸的, 爆发的；极易引起争论的 n. 爆炸物, 炸药

  • Examples：

    Corporate China is racing to build up a presence in Africa.

    • be racing to 争夺
    • race / rush / scramble

entry.title: 看世界20210120
entry.content:
Trump Farewell Message

  • farewell 告别

We did what we came here to do and so much more. This week we inaugurate a new administration and pray for its success in keeping America safe and prosperous. We extend our best wishes and we also want them to have luck.

  • inaugurate 开始，开创，为...举行开幕式、就职典礼

  • extend our best wishes 致以我们最良好的祝愿 > All Americans were horrified by the assault on our Capitol. Political violence is an attack on everything we cherish as Americans. It can never be tolerated. Now more than ever we must unify around our shared values and rise above the partisan rancor.

  • be horrified by 对...感到震惊

  • assault n. v. 攻击

  • Capitol n.美国国会大厦

  • now more than ever 现在比以往任何时候都多

  • unify v. 团结，统一

  • shared values 共享价值

  • rise above 超越

  • the partisan rancor 党派斗争

  • Examples:

    同样重要的是，我们必须竭尽全力维护我们作为文明社会成员所珍视的一切。

    Equally important is that we must do all in our power to preserve everything we cherish as members of a civilized society.

    It is equally important that , we must do all in our power to preserve everything we cherish as members of a civilized society.

    • do all in our power 竭尽全力，尽我们所能
    • Equally important is that , ... = It is equally important that , ...

entry.title: 看世界20210119
entry.content:
The 'Trump Baby' blimp that dogged the President for years will live on in a museum (CNN)

  • blimp 软式小型飞船，肥胖的人

  • dog v.困扰 > A giant blimp depicting Donald Trump as a diaper-clad baby, which followed the outgoing US President on his visits to London and symbolized international opposition to his administration, has secured its place in history after being acquired by a British museum.

  • depict 描绘

  • diaper 尿布

  • outgoing = departing 即将离任的 lame duck

  • symbolize 象征着

  • has secured its place 保住一席之地

  • National Guard 国民警卫队

  • vex 使苦恼

The 20-foot-tall "Trump Baby" blimp was created ahead of the President's first visit to the UK, when hundreds of thousands of Britons poured onto the country's streets to protest his presence in the country.

  • sniper 狙击者
  • Deep State 隐形政府
  • ahead of = prior to = before

It will now be displayed in the Museum of London alongside other remnants of public protests in the British capital, the institution announced on the eve of Trump's departure from the Oval Office.

  • remnant n.残余 adj.残余的
  • on the eve of 在...前夕
  • departure from his life

entry.title: 生日快乐
念恋叶语
看世界20210106
entry.content:
Chinese authorities began a probe into working conditions at Pinduoduo Inc., China’s fastest-growing ecommerce group which is facing a growing public relations crisis, following the death of an employee surnamed Zhang in her early 20s that renewed criticism of the long hours commonly practiced at China’s tech companies.

  • begin = commence = launch
  • probe = investigation 调查
  • public relations (PR) crisis 公关危机
  • following = in the wake of

The so-called 996 office schedule -- 9 a.m. to 9 p.m., six days a week, plus overtime -- has spurred criticism in previous years following complaints from tech workers and earlier deaths. Still, tech billionaires from Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. founder Jack Ma to JD.com Inc. chief Richard Liu have endorsed the practice as necessary for survival in an intensely competitive industry and the key to accumulating personal wealth.

  • spur n. 马刺；鼓舞，刺激；山坡 vi. 骑马疾驰；给予刺激 vt. 激励，鞭策；给…装踢马刺
  • endorse vt. <商>在(尤指支票的)背面签字;背书；赞同,认可,支持(意见,活动,某人等)；在广告上说本人使用并赞同某产品；在(文件的)背面写评论;批注(公文)；在(驾驶执照上)记录违章事项
  • intensely =fiercely
  • accumulate vt. & vi. 堆积; 积累

PDD’s first public statement expressed sadness at the death, condolences for the family, and included pleas from Zhang’s father not to embroil her death in controversy. However, a social media post expressing different sentiments prompted a backlash from netizens, with some calling the company “cold-blooded”.

  • express = voice
  • condolence n. 同情;吊唁
  • plea n. 请愿, 请求；借口, 托辞
  • embroil vt. 使卷入；使混乱
  • controversy n. 公开辩论, 论战
  • sentiment n. (对怜悯、怀旧等的)柔情；态度或意见；观点; 意见
  • backlash n. 强烈反应, 对抗性反应；后冲, 反撞; 后坐力
  • keyboard warrior 键盘侠
  • netizen 网民

An image, appearing to be a screenshot from Pinduoduo’s official account on China’s Quora-like platform Zhihu, went viral on Monday and showed an answer to a question from a netizen asking for people’s thoughts on Zhang’s death and the company’s responsibilities.

  • viral adj. 滤过性毒菌引起的；滤过性毒菌的
  • go viral 病毒式传播

“Look at people in the underclass: which of them is not exchanging life for money? I have never thought of this as a problem of capital, it is more a problem of society. We are living in a time where people hustle at the expense of their lives. You can choose a comfortable life but you have to accept the consequences of comfortable living. People can control how much effort they make – we all can,” the post, under the PDD official account, stated.

  • exchange = trade
  • hustle vt. 催促；猛推；强夺 vi. 赶紧；硬挤过去；拼命挣钱 n. 推；奔忙；拥挤喧嚷
  • at the expense of 以......为代价

entry.title: 看世界20210105
entry.content:
DeepMind's AI agent MuZero could turbocharge YouTube

  • artificial intelligence (AI)
  • turbocharge 涡轮增压

London-based DeepMind first published details of MuZero in 2019 , but waited until the publication of a paper in the journal Nature to discuss it.

  • London-based = Headquartered in London > It represents the firm's latest success in deep reinforcement learning - a technique that use many-layered neural networks to let machines teach themselves new skills via a process of trial and error, receiving "rewards" for success rather than being told what to do.

  • reinforcement n. 援军;增援警力；(感情或思想等的)巩固,加强,强化

  • trial and error 试错

MuZero follows in the footsteps of : a program referred to as DQN , which achieved human-beating proficiency in Atari video games using only pixels and game scores as input.

  • follow in the footsteps of 紧随...步伐，效仿
  • proficiency n. 熟练, 精通

AlphaGo, the program which beat master Go player Lee-Sedol 4-1 in a groundbreaking competition in 2016 , after being trained on past games.

  • groundbreaking

AlphaGo Zero, which surpassed AlphaGo in performance the following year after training itself from scratch having only been provided with the basic rules of the game.

  • surpass vt. 胜过，优于；超越；非…所能办到或理解
  • from scratch 从头开始

AlphaZero, which in 2017 generalised AlphaGo Zero so that it could be applied to others games, including chess and Shogi.

  • generalise vt. & vi. 概括, 归纳, 推论 vt. 推广, 普及

Most recently, DeepMind - which is owned by the same parent as Google's - made a breakthrough in protein folding by adapting these techniques, which could pave the way to new drugs to fight disease.

  • Alphabet Google母公司
  • protein folding 蛋白质折叠
  • pave the way to 为...铺平道路
  • pave vt. 铺设；安排；作铺设之用

MuZero could soon be put to practical use too.

DeepMind was already using it to try to invent a new kind of video compression.

  • encode video

As Google owns the world's biggest video-sharing platform - YouTube - it has the potential to be a big money-saver.

  • slash costs 大幅削减成本
  • a mixed blessing 喜忧参半

entry.title: 看世界20210104
entry.content:
The new light-based quantum computer Jiuzhang has achieved quantum supremacy

  • quantum supremacy 量子霸权

  • supremacy n. 至高, 无上;最高权力

  • regional supremacy 地区霸权

  • regional discrimination 地域歧视

  • geographic discrimination 地域歧视

  • quantum computing 量子计算

  • quantum leap 量子跃迁 > A second type of quantum device performed a calculation impossible for a traditional computer

  • calculate vt. & vi. 计算, 估计；打算, 旨在

A new type of quantum computer has proven that it can reign supreme, too.

  • reign vi. 统治；盛行；支配；君临 n. 统治；支配；统治时期
  • supreme adj. 最高的; 至上的；最重要的
  • the Supreme Court = the highest court 最高法院

A photonic quantum computer, which harnesses particles of light, or photons, performed a calculation that’s impossible for a conventional computer, researchers in China report online December 3 in Science. That milestone, known as quantum supremacy, has been met only once before, in 2019 by Google’s quantum computer (SN: 10/23/19). Google’s computer, however, is based on superconducting materials, not photons.

  • harness n. 马具, 挽具 vt. 给(马等)装上挽具；治理, 利用
  • conventional = traditional = classical
  • milestone = landmark
  • aka = also known as = otherwise known as
  • SN = serial number

Named Jiuzhang after an ancient Chinese mathematical text, the new quantum computer can perform a calculation in 200 seconds that would take more than half a billion years on the world’s fastest non-quantum, or classical, computer.

  • Named A after B 以B命名A

One limitation of Jiuzhang, Weedbrook notes, is that it can perform only a single type of task, namely, boson sampling. In contrast, Google’s quantum computer could be programmed to execute a variety of algorithms.

  • namely adv. 即是；也就是；换句话说
  • in sharp / stark contrast 形成鲜明对比

entry.title: 看世界20210103
entry.content:
The General Atomics MQ-9 Reaper is an unmanned aerial vehicle capable of remotely controlled or autonomous flight operations developed by General Atomics Aeronautical Systems primarily for the United States Air Force.

  • reaper n. 收割者；收获者；收割机

  • unmanned adj. 无人的；无人操纵的；被阉割的 v. 使失去男子气质（unman的过去式和过去分词形式）

  • unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) 无人机 drone

  • autonomous adj. 自治的

  • aeronautical adj. 航空学的 > The AGM-114 Hellfire is an air-to-surface missile first developed for anti-armor use, but later models were developed for precision drone strikes against other target types, and have been used in a number of actions aimed to "destroy high-value targets."

  • hellfire n. 地狱之火

  • tactical missile 战术导弹

  • ballistic missile n. 弹道飞弹

  • intercontinental missile 洲际导弹

  • armor n. 装甲；盔甲 vt. 为…装甲

  • anti-armor 反装甲

  • precision n. 精确度, 准确(性)

  • strike against 打击

The AGM-114R-9X is a variant of the AGM-114 "Hellfire" developed by Lockheed that is meant to reduce risk of civilian casualties while using pop-out blades to maintain lethality.

  • variant n. 变体;变种;变型；(词等的)变体;异读；(书等的)不同版本;改编 adj. 不同的; 差别的; 变异的;易变的, 不定的; 各种各样的
  • civilian n. 平民, 百姓
  • casualty n. 意外事故；伤亡人员；急诊室
  • lethality n. 致命性,毁坏性
  • serial killer 连环杀手
  • facial recognition 人脸识别

entry.title: 看世界20210102
entry.content:
'Deepfake' Queen delivers alternative Christmas speech, in warning about misinformation

  • deepfake = deep learning + fake

  • fake vt. 伪造, 篡改, 对…做手脚；仿造 vt. & vi. 假装 n. 骗子；赝品 adj. 假的, 冒充的

  • alternative adj. 两者择一的, 供替代的；不寻常的, 非传统性的；非正统的 n. 取舍, 抉择, 可供选择的事物；选择的余地, 可供选择的机会

  • alternative music 非主流音乐

  • alternative right 另类右派（美国），另类保守派

  • alternative fuel 替代性燃料 > London(CNN) A fake Queen Elizabeth danced across TV screens on Christmas as part of a "deepfake" speech aired by a British broadcaster.

  • as part of 作为...的一部分

  • Google acquired DeepLearning as part of its ambition to expand into AI.

  • air vt. & vi.播送, 广播

The real British monarch traditionally delivers a Christmas Day speech aired around the world.

  • monarch n. 君主, 帝王
  • around the world = the world over = worldwide

But her speech on Friday at 3 p.m. was followed by a digitally-created fake of the Queen, aired on Channel 4 and voiced by an actor, warning viewers to question "whether what we see and hear is always what it seems."

  • be followed by 被...跟随

The broadcaster said the video was supposed to offer "a stark warning about the advanced technology that is enabling the proliferation of misinformation and fake news in a digital age."

  • stark adj. 僵硬的, 光秃秃的, 荒凉的；完全的, 全然的
  • in stark contrast = in sharp contrast 形成鲜明对比的是
  • proliferation n. 增殖，扩散；分芽繁殖

Deepfake technology can be used to create convincing yet entirely fictional video content, and is often used to spread misinformation.

  • fictional adj. 虚构的;小说的
  • moderate the content 审核内容
  • content moderator

Channel 4 annually accompanies the Queen's traditional speech with an "alternative Christmas message." This message has been aired since 1993.

  • accompany vt. 陪伴, 陪同；伴随…同时发生；伴奏
  • accompany A with B
  • Buckingham Palace declined to comment on the alternative Christmas message.
  • decline n. 下降, 减少, 衰退 vt. & vi. 辞谢; 谢绝(邀请等) vi. (太阳)落下
  • Downing Street = No. 10 = London 指代英国政府

entry.title: 看世界20210101
entry.content:
Boston Dynamics

  • Boston Dynamics 波斯顿动力公司

Boston Dynamics is an American engineering and robotics design company founded in 1992 as a spin-off from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology. Headquartered in Waltham, Massachusetts, Boston Dynamics is owned by the Hyundai Motor Group since 2020. - robotic adj. 自动的；机器人的，像机器人的 n. 机器人学 - founded = launched adj. 有基础的 v. 创立；建立（found的过去分词） - spin-off n. 副产品;让产易股,抽资脱离 - the Massachusetts Institute of Technology 麻省理工学院 - headquarter vi. 设总部 vt. 将…的总部设在；把…放在总部里 - its headquarters are/is in Boston - with its headquarters in ... - be owned by 由...拥有

entry.title: 余霞教授：给研究生新生的一些关于实验笔记的方法建议
entry.content:
实验笔记，是专指用于记录实验时间、实验目的、环境参数、实验过程、观测结果的笔记。

为什么要学习做好实验笔记？
  • 能够证实实验想法、过程和数据的真实性。
  • 有利于科研的延续。
  • 从失败的实验中提出和凝练问题是每一个科研工作者非常重要的能力。
如何做好实验笔记呢？

参考“罗夕夕实验笔记”

  • 使用正式的实验记录本。
  • 内容完整：实验记录的内容包括实验目的、实验过程、实验结论。实验前要明确目的、理清思路；实验过程要尽量详细，尤其是细节的记录，比如加了一个什么样的监测方法、换了某一片反射镜。实验之后要总结和发现问题，跟导师及时讨论。
  • 尊重时间。
  • 尊重签名。

文章转自：Prof Fish一波粒子

entry.title: 余霞教授：给研究生新生的一些关于写论文的方法建议
entry.content:
断裂句问题(Cracked sentences)
  • 找出断裂句的方法很简单：数逗号的个数。如果大于等于3个，就值得被挑出来斟酌。
长句问题(Long sentences)
  • 如果句子多于25个单词不防将它拆分成两个短句。
解释问题(Explanation sentences)
  • 要尽可能地提供解释的依据：模拟计算、参考文献。
转折连词问题(Adversative phrases)
  • 并列关系
  • 转折关系
  • 因果关系
重复词组问题(Repetition)
  • 其实重复只是表象，根本原因还是多个内容揉在一起造成的主语和宾语混乱。

文章转自：Prof Fish一波粒子

entry.title: 余霞教授：给研究生新生的一些关于读文献的方法建议
entry.content:
文献阅读是科研工作很重要的内容，因此养成好的阅读习惯和掌握有效的阅读方法是很重要的。但是，“尽信书不如无书”，阅读中更重要的还是要提出问题和总结思考。

第一步丨英文专业词汇怎么办？
  • 熟练背诵掌握这些专业词汇
第二步丨在哪里寻找文献？
  • 专业数据库：Web of Science
  • 追本溯源
第三步丨怎么读文献？
  • 数字
  • 物理量的单位
第四步丨如何整理文献？
  • 用标准工具软件整理文献
第五步丨如何整理读书笔记？
  • 要多记问题

文章转自：Prof Fish一波粒子
